title: Baaghi 2
tmdbOverview: Ronny, a battle-hardened soldier, learns of the disappearance of the daughter of his former lover. His intense investigation leads him to uncover a web of crimes and a secret from the past.
synopsis: Released in 2018, Baaghi 2 is a action, crime and adventure film from India. It has a 4.8 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2010s and genre rankings. It carries a 12A certification (GB rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
